_doc: Execution logs end abruptly mid-Delay — no Job Completed line. Last user-workflow line is the start of the long-running step. The Robot Service logs the kill request and abrupt exit. Kill request source is recorded as API.

Data.Message: Job 'b2c0b2c3-d4e5-4678-9012-3456789bbbbb' (ReleaseName=LongRunningProcess) ended with unexpected exit code 0x40010004. The executor was terminated externally; no graceful shutdown was performed.
[Robot] Stop request received for job 'b2c0b2c3-d4e5-4678-9012-3456789bbbbb' (strategy=Kill, source=API). Terminating executor process.
[LongRunningProcess] Starting long-running work — 5 minute delay simulates a slow inference or batch step.
Job 'b2c0b2c3-d4e5-4678-9012-3456789bbbbb' (ReleaseName=LongRunningProcess) entering Running state on MOCK-HOST.
